tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Show recent commits to understand context

session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [195 lines omitted] ...
131→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 133→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 171→ "error": null 185→## Error Case 199→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 217→ "error": null

41c3fb83c Trigger CI workflows ec967656b Add `anthropic_api_fast_path` GlobalConfig setting to control API fast path behavior 21440b3c7 Remove plan staging dirs before implementation 153bca698 Add plan for PR #9068 a0892694d Add plan: Plan: Add `anthropic_api_fast_path` GlobalConfig Setting 866d0ff0f Update CHANGELOG.md with 23 commits merged since ebba4e54f (#9060) bae59f09f Add remote repository support to objective plan command with --repo flag (#9046) 2a2d7a152 Enrich remote rebase conflict resolution prompt to match local slash command (#8569) c56e0626a Add objective link insertion to PR body (#9027) 27f4ec0a9 Add short names to testing layer references throughout documentation (#9048) aed52e300 Fix: Incremental dispatch now updates plan-header dispatch metadata (#9047) 4eea8f29a Implement autonomous consolidate-learn-plans workflow for unified learn plan consolidation (#9030) 3c6adf70f Fix ternary operator examples and documentation formatting (#9039) 29d215652 Simplify CI job ordering by removing fix-formatting dependency from speculative test jobs (#9035) b64631bc8 Unify launch command dispatch via RemoteGitHub single code path (#9021) c17f25a5f Convert `erk launch` to @no_repo_required with --repo flag (#9019) 3aff883f4 Add progress output to land pipeline and stack commands (#9031) 63134a17f Apply `erk-pr` label to all erk-submitted PRs and update dash to show all erk PRs (#9000) 1724e572e Fix: `update_local_ref` desyncs checked-out worktrees (#9020) 89f460206 Add CI job to block .erk/impl-context/ from merging to master (#9025)

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-09 09:36:32 PT

Found 0 violations. All code complies with dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - No violations
✅ Exception handling - No violations
✅ Path operations - No violations
✅ Import organization - No violations
✅ Default parameters - No violations
✅ Inline imports - Conditional imports allowed (anthropic_api_fast_path feature)
✅ Frozen dataclasses - No violations
✅ Keyword-only arguments - No violations
✅ Re-exports (__all__) - No violations

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/erk_installation/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/core/context.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/integration/test_real_global_config.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-09 09:36:32 PT**: No violations detected

</details>", "body": "<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-09 09:37:13 PT

Found 0 violations across 5 files. All changes follow erk coding standards correctly.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **GlobalConfig field addition** → loaded [docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/master/docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md)
- **Monkeypatch usage** → loaded [docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-vs-fakes-decision.md](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/master/docs/learned/testing/monkeypatch-vs-fakes-decision.md)

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess\.run` - None found
✅ `os\.chdir\(\)` - None found
✅ `import time\|time\.sleep\|datetime\.now` - None found
✅ `gt (sync|submit|restack)` without --no-interactive - None found
✅ try/except in gateway fake/dry_run files - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **GlobalConfig field addition** - Correctly implemented with all checklist items:
 - Field added to dataclass with default value
 - `.test()` factory method updated
 - Load logic updated in `RealErkInstallation.load_config()`
 - Save logic updated in `RealErkInstallation.save_config()`
 - Tests added for roundtrip and default loading
 - Documentation updated

✅ **Monkeypatch usage** - Acceptable use per guidelines:
 - Testing integration code (`RealErkInstallation`) that uses `Path.home()`
 - Process-level global for `~/.erk/` access (allowed exception)

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/erk_installation/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/core/context.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/integration/test_real_global_config.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-09 09:37:13 PT**: No violations detected. GlobalConfig field addition follows all checklist requirements. Monkeypatch usage is acceptable per testing guidelines.

</details>",

session.assistant:
## Summary
I have successfully executed the `pr-feedback-classifier` skill for PR #9068. Here is the complete JSON output:
```json { "success": true, "pr_number": 9068, "pr_title": "Add `anthropic_api_fast_path` GlobalConfig setting to control API fast path behavior", "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9068", "actionable_threads": [ { "thread_id": "PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5zEqgZ", "type": "review", "path": "docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md", "line": 75, "is_outdated": false, "classification": "actionable", "pre_existing": false, "action_summary": "Replace enumerable 'Current Fields' catalog with source pointer to GlobalConfig class to prevent drift", "complexity": "local", "original_comment": "**Audit PR Docs**: Drift risk — documents specific values/paths that will change.

Source: `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py:237`

Risk: This 'Current Fields' catalog lists all GlobalConfig fields. It's an enumerable catalog that will drift as fields are added, renamed, or removed — as demonstrated by this very PR adding a new entry. According to `learned-docs-core.md`, enumerable catalogs don't belong in learned docs; use source pointers instead.

Consider replacing with: See `GlobalConfig` in `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py` for the current field list." } ], "discussion_actions": [], "informational_count": 4, "batches": [ { "name": "Local Fixes", "complexity": "local", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [0] }, { "name": "Single-File", "complexity": "single_file", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Cross-Cutting", "complexity": "cross_cutting", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Complex", "complexity": "complex", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Informational", "complexity": "informational", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] } ], "error": null } ```
**Analysis:**
The PR has 1 actionable thread from the audit-pr-docs bot review: - **Thread ID:** PRRT_kwDOPxC3hc5zEqgZ - **Location:** `/docs/learned/architecture/globalconfig-field-addition.md` at line 75 - **Issue:** The 'Current Fields' section contains an enumerable catalog of GlobalConfig fields that will drift as fields are added. Per documentation standards, this should be replaced with a source pointer to the actual `GlobalConfig` class. - **Complexity:** Local (single line change) - **Auto-proceed:** True (low-risk documentation fix)
Additionally, there are 4 informational discussion comments (workflow status updates and bot reviews that don't require action) and 1 conditional test coverage flag regarding executor selection logic that was not tested, though the configuration field itself was tested.
